Alright, so once we have our campaign set up, we need to click on the little monster up here in the upper right hand corner and we're going to go to admin settings. The third one down is custom fields, click on contacts, click add. This is going to say consult link. This one's really important. This here is going to be URL and the description is going to be consult link as well. We do not want to put too many spaces or anything like that. Make sure it's exactly as far as the label and the description goes. It just needs to be consult link. It's going to be super important when we start making our zaps. So click save and you should have consult link in here so that when we do our URLs later, it knows where to put it. And so I think that's probably it for now for Agile. We'll come back to editing the campaigns after we get some more things set up.
